mapper.sql: id, channel, user_id, state, action_type, change_val, amount, transaction_extend, insert_time, deposit_recharge, deposit_free, win_recharge, win_free, withdraw_charge

mapper.update:
update rec_transaction_new
channel = #{channel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
state = #{state,jdbcType=INTEGER},
action_type = #{actionType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
change_val = #{changeVal,jdbcType=BIGINT},
amount = #{amount,jdbcType=BIGINT},
transaction_extend = #{transactionExtend,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
insert_time = #{insertTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
deposit_recharge = #{depositRecharge,jdbcType=BIGINT},
deposit_free = #{depositFree,jdbcType=BIGINT},
win_recharge = #{winRecharge,jdbcType=BIGINT},
win_free = #{winFree,jdbcType=BIGINT},
withdraw_charge = #{withdrawCharge,jdbcType=BIGINT},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update rec_transaction_new set channel = #{channel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, state = #{state,jdbcType=INTEGER}, action_type = #{actionType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, change_val = #{changeVal,jdbcType=BIGINT}, amount = #{amount,jdbcType=BIGINT}, transaction_extend = #{transactionExtend,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, insert_time = #{insertTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, deposit_recharge = #{depositRecharge,jdbcType=BIGINT}, deposit_free = #{depositFree,jdbcType=BIGINT}, win_recharge = #{winRecharge,jdbcType=BIGINT}, win_free = #{winFree,jdbcType=BIGINT}, withdraw_charge = #{withdrawCharge,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
